meta.notes: Warm run — fresh session on pika-media-env. Agent used nohup+poll pattern. MiniMax music generation dominated execution time (118.6s). Beat-sync pipeline: scene detection → MiniMax music gen → beat alignment → audio mix → ffmpeg encode.

test_input.name: charli-daily-vlog.mp4
test_input.description: TikTok-style short vlog, English speech, vertical format

task.name: music-beat-sync
task.purpose: Add hype beat-synced background music to 67.8s vlog video
task.expected_output: Video with hype beat-synced background music, scene cuts aligned to beats

install.notes: Skills pre-loaded. Dependencies pre-installed in environment. No install time counted.

asset_acquisition.notes: Downloaded 4.7MB in ~1.1s actual. Agent also read SKILL.md (16.2s).

steps.name: nohup_background_start
steps.notes: Started beat_sync.py in background via nohup

steps.name: poll_completion
steps.notes: Polled with sleep 15 loop. Script reported 118621ms total. MiniMax music generation is the bottleneck (60-175s).

execution.notes: Full pipeline in 118.6s. MiniMax music generation dominated. Scene detection + beat alignment + audio mix + ffmpeg encode were fast relative to music gen.

delivery.notes: CDN upload in 2.8s actual. Output 16.5MB — larger than input due to added music track.
